news.title: UNISOC Expands FPGA Portfolio with New Industrial-Grade Devices
news.summary: UNISOC announces new FPGA products targeting industrial automation and communications applications with enhanced features and competitive pricing
news.author: UNISOC Marketing Team
news.content:
UNISOC has expanded its FPGA product line with the introduction of new industrial-grade devices designed for automation, communications, and automotive applications. The new devices feature enhanced logic capacity, improved power efficiency, and extended temperature range operation.

Key highlights of the new FPGA lineup include:
- Increased logic density up to 50K LUTs
- Enhanced DSP capabilities for signal processing
- Industrial temperature range (-40°C to +85°C)
- AEC-Q100 automotive qualification options
- Competitive pricing for cost-sensitive applications

'We are committed to providing our customers with high-quality, cost-effective FPGA solutions,' said the UNISOC Product Director. 'These new devices address the growing demand for programmable logic in industrial and automotive markets.'

The new products are available through authorized distributors including BeiLuo Electronics. Samples and evaluation kits are available now, with production quantities shipping in Q1 2026.

news.title: UNISOC and BeiLuo Electronics Strengthen Distribution Partnership
news.summary: Expanded partnership enhances technical support and availability of UNISOC products in China market
news.author: BeiLuo Electronics
news.content:
UNISOC and BeiLuo Electronics have announced an expanded distribution partnership to better serve the growing demand for FPGA and semiconductor solutions in China.

Under the enhanced agreement, BeiLuo Electronics will:
- Increase inventory levels for popular UNISOC products
- Provide enhanced technical support and FAE services
- Offer reference designs and application support
- Conduct joint training programs for customers

'This partnership expansion reflects the strong market demand for UNISOC products,' said BeiLuo Electronics General Manager. 'We are excited to bring UNISOC's innovative FPGA solutions to more customers across China.'

Customers can now access UNISOC products with shorter lead times and comprehensive local support through BeiLuo Electronics' nationwide network.

news.title: UNISOC Releases New Industrial Communication Reference Design
news.summary: Complete reference solution for industrial Ethernet switch implementation using USC9002 FPGA
news.author: UNISOC Applications Team
news.content:
UNISOC has released a comprehensive reference design for industrial Ethernet switch applications, demonstrating the capabilities of the USC9002 FPGA in communications infrastructure.

The reference design includes:
- 8-port Gigabit Ethernet switch implementation
- Support for RSTP, PRP, and HSR redundancy protocols
- IEEE 1588 PTP time synchronization
- Web-based management interface
- Complete schematics and BOM

'This reference design showcases the USC9002's suitability for industrial communications applications,' said the UNISOC FAE Manager. 'Customers can use this as a starting point for their own designs, significantly reducing development time.'

The design files are available to qualified customers through BeiLuo Electronics. Technical support and customization services are also available.

news.title: UNISOC FPGA Achieves AEC-Q100 Automotive Qualification
news.summary: Key FPGA products now qualified for automotive applications, expanding market opportunities
news.author: UNISOC Quality Team
news.content:
UNISOC has successfully completed AEC-Q100 qualification for its USC9001 and USC9002 FPGA products, enabling their use in automotive electronics applications.

The qualification process included:
- High temperature operating life (HTOL) testing
- Temperature cycling and thermal shock
- Electrostatic discharge (ESD) characterization
- Early life failure rate (ELFR) testing

'Achieving AEC-Q100 qualification is a significant milestone for UNISOC,' said the Quality Director. 'It demonstrates our commitment to meeting the stringent quality and reliability requirements of the automotive industry.'

Automotive applications for UNISOC FPGAs include:
- ADAS processing and sensor fusion
- Infotainment systems
- Body electronics control
- Powertrain control modules

Automotive-grade devices are available now with PPAP documentation support.
